# Obinutuzumab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Obinutuzumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Obinutuzumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>28 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Obinutuzumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Chronic lymphocytic leukaemia (CLL)&nbsp;Gazyvaro in combination with chlorambucil is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with previously untreated chronic lymphocytic leukaemia (CLL) and...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>acute lymphoblastic/lymphocytic leukemia（99.5%）</li>
<li>chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma with immunoglobulin heavy chain variable-region gene somatic hypermutation（99.2%）</li>
<li>pregerminal center chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma（99.2%）</li>
<li>follicular lymphoma（99.2%）</li>
<li>Richter syndrome（99.2%）</li>
<li>mantle cell lymphoma（98.8%）</li>
<li>metastatic neoplasm（98.5%）</li>
<li>malignant spiradenoma（98.5%）</li>
<li>neoplasm of mature B-cells（98.1%）</li>
<li>small intestinal Burkitt lymphoma（97.8%）</li>
<li>Langerhans cell histiocytosis（97.8%）</li>
<li>thyroid gland mucosa-associated lymphoid tissue lymphoma（97.8%）</li>
<li>small intestinal mucosa-associated lymphoid tissue lymphoma（97.8%）</li>
<li>chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma（97.7%）</li>
<li>breast mucosa-associated lymphoid tissue lymphoma（97.7%）</li>
<li>tonsillar lymphoma（97.7%）</li>
<li>B-cell neoplasm（97.2%）</li>
<li>follicular lymphoma, susceptibility to, 1（97.1%）</li>
<li>histiocytic and dendritic cell neoplasm（96.6%）</li>
<li>childhood carcinoid tumor（96.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/obinutuzumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
